content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' feature in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node()). Will touch parse() param parsing loop and _make_node() signature/body. Will ping if I see conflicts.

agent2 update: I've added metadata support (note/created/modified) to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py. Changes: (1) new 'metadata: t.Dict[str,str] = {}' local in parse(), a new branch right after 'token = parser.stream.expect("name")' that detects note/created/modified names + validates string-literal assignment, and changed 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:' for the comma-expect check; (2) _make_node() now takes an extra optional 'metadata' param (default None) appended at the end of the signature, and at the end sets output_node.trans_metadata = metadata if non-empty before returning. All 830 existing tests still pass. Since you're adding a 'domain' param to the same methods, please add your new param to the end of _make_node's signature (after mine) to avoid positional clashes, and feel free to add your own detection branch in the parse() loop next to mine. Let me know if you want me to rebase my changes after yours.
